title: Commit safety sweep closing
body: Salty Rolling Compass closing broad safety-sweep claim 1e7a0dd3 before the final state-preservation commit so the closure itself lands durably. Source commits landed: 57de914f for expert template/adaptor active-workflow content and 1cc83d62 for practice.md fitness metadata. Final state commit will include napkin, active claims, closed-claim archive, rendered shared comms log, and comms events. Stormbound d526f5d3 and Gilded 1435de15 remain active for their offline sessions to resume.
